**RISK-OFF — US-Iran Strait of Hormuz Military Conflict (July 13, 2026)**

US CENTCOM struck Iranian targets over the weekend after MV GFS Galaxy attack in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran retaliated with missiles/drones against UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain. Vessel crossings through strait: 18-22 normal → 6 today. **Brent crude +4% ($78.82)**.

- S&P 500 futures: −0.3% to −0.51%
